title: oberonia formosana
intro: Oberonia formosana, also known as Formosa Oberonia, is a species of orchid native to Taiwan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Oberonia formosana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
